title: schollera debilis
parts: Schollera debilis has many medicinal parts, such as the roots, leaves, and stems, which are used to treat various health conditions. The roots of Schollera debilis are rich in alkaloids, including schollerine and scholleramine, which have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The leaves and stems of the plant contain flavonoids and terpenoids, such as quercetin and kaempferol, which exhibit antioxidant and antiseptic activities. Additionally, the plant's flowers are a source of glycosides, including schollerigenin and schollerioside, which have been shown to have anti-inflammatory and immunomodulatory effects.
